name: Apartment System (MongoDB + Go + Node)
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; npm ci --prefix apps/web; echo Web deps installed. JWT_SECRET and MONGODB_URI are set on the devcontainer service in docker-compose.yml — Rebuild Container after changing them.'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; test -x apps/web/node_modules/.bin/next || npm ci --prefix apps/web'
